_description: Audit corrections applied 2026-05-31. All metrics now reflect actual result files.

toxigene.issue: v7 used a much larger dataset with potentially leaky random split. Spatial holdout has only 9 test samples — F1 unreliable. Both numbers are honest but measure different things.
toxigene.recommendation: Report v7 F1=0.886 (n=1443) with caveat about random split, OR retrain with more data under spatial holdout. Do NOT report 0.886 as spatial-holdout result.
toxigene.status: CORRECTED — using holdout result (0.492) until spatial-holdout retraining with more data

stream_gnn.issue: Training labels synthetically generated (random contamination injection). AUROC reflects ability to learn trivial synthetic patterns.
stream_gnn.status: CORRECTED — added _WARNING disclosure to results file

biomotion.issue: Suspiciously perfect — diffusion model on same data gets 0.826. Under investigation for data leakage.
biomotion.leakage_mechanism: effect_pct/100 used as features[0-11,14], label = effect_pct > 20. Model learned to threshold its own label.
biomotion.fix: expand_biomotion_data.py rewritten: features now encode measurement channel (one-hot) + concentration, NOT effect magnitude
biomotion.retraining: COMPLETED — AUROC dropped from 0.9999 to 0.8067 (confirmed leakage artifact)

fusion_ci.issue: Compiled master_results.json used simulated CIs instead of actual analytical CIs
fusion_ci.status: CORRECTED — master_results.json now uses actual exp9 CIs

case_study_scores.issue: 279 identical anomaly probability values (0.9929454922676086) across 5/6 events. Not real model outputs.
